label: Table
summary: Dressing for honest data tables: bordered cells, silver header row, stripe and mono-numeral modifiers.
era: The high-score table: silver header row, bordered cells, cellpadding=2 cellspacing=0, forever.

classes.name: rs-table
classes.role: base dressing: 1px cell borders, silver header row

classes.name: rs-table--data
classes.role: modifier: mono numerals for data-heavy tables

a11y: Data tables only: <caption>, <thead>, and th scope="col"/"row" as in the snippet. The borders are CSS; the semantics stay honest.
